description: A reference liquidity note asset referencing short-tenor cash instruments and overnight cash management in Singapore dollars. Disclosures focus on duration, settlement timing, and FX exposure assumptions.

docs.label: Liquidity note summary
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Summarizes tenor, eligible instruments, and cash-management assumptions.

docs.label: FX memo
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Describes reference currency exposure and settlement conventions.

docs.label: Risk disclosure
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Lists duration, FX, and liquidity risks for reference review.
